sections.title: 1. What are cookies?
paragraphs: Cookies are small text files stored on the user's device when visiting a website. They help ensure proper site operation and improve user experience.

sections.title: 2. Types of cookies used
paragraphs: This website uses the following types of cookies:
list: Technical cookies: required for basic service operation and user authentication.
Analytics cookies (optional): allow platform usage analysis to improve the service.

sections.title: 3. Third-party cookies
paragraphs: If analytics tools are enabled (for example, Google Analytics), they may install cookies managed by third parties.

sections.title: 4. Consent management
paragraphs: Users can accept, reject, or configure non-essential cookies through the cookie banner available on the platform.

sections.title: 5. How to disable cookies
paragraphs: Users can configure their browser to block or delete installed cookies. Disabling technical cookies may affect proper service operation.

sections.title: 6. Updates
paragraphs: This policy may be updated to adapt to legal or technical changes. The current version will always be available on this page.

paragraphs: Appropriate technical and organizational measures are applied to ensure the security and confidentiality of personal data.

sections.title: 10. Cookies usage

paragraphs: This privacy policy may be updated to adapt to legal or technical changes. The current version will always be available on this page.

terms.title: Terms of Use and Contracting Conditions

sections.title: 1. Provider identification
paragraphs: Owner: Sergio Sánchez Rech
Tax ID: 48345843G
Contact email: contacto@tudominio.com
For legal communications, contact through the email provided.

sections.title: 2. Purpose
paragraphs: This document regulates access, use, and contracting of the SaaS service offered through this platform, aimed at end users (B2C).

sections.title: 3. User registration
paragraphs: Using the service requires creating an account with truthful and updated information. Users are responsible for keeping credentials confidential.

sections.title: 4. Allowed and prohibited use
list: Use the service according to law and these terms
Do not engage in fraudulent, abusive, or unlawful use
Do not attempt unauthorized access to systems or data
Do not resell the service without express authorization

sections.title: 5. Plans, pricing, and taxes
paragraphs: Full access to the service may require one of the available paid plans. Prices are shown in euros and include applicable taxes unless stated otherwise.

sections.title: 6. Payment method
paragraphs: Payment is made in advance by bank card or other methods available through the payment platform in use (for example, Stripe).

sections.title: 7. Renewal and cancellation
paragraphs: Subscriptions renew automatically based on selected frequency (monthly or yearly). Users may cancel renewal at any time from their account while keeping access until the end of the paid period.

sections.title: 8. Withdrawal right
paragraphs: According to current regulations, users acknowledge and accept that, as this is a digital service provided immediately, the withdrawal right is lost once service has started.

sections.title: 9. Service suspension or termination
paragraphs: The provider reserves the right to suspend or cancel accounts that breach these terms, without refund rights in case of misuse.

sections.title: 10. Liability
paragraphs: The service is provided as is. Continuous availability or total absence of errors is not guaranteed, although reasonable measures are taken for proper operation.

sections.title: 11. Intellectual property
paragraphs: All content, code, and service elements belong to the provider or licensed third parties. Reproduction without authorization is prohibited.

sections.title: 12. Applicable law
paragraphs: These conditions are governed by Spanish law. For any dispute, parties submit to the courts corresponding to the consumer's domicile.

legalNotice.title: Legal Notice
legalNotice.intro: In compliance with Law 34/2002, of July 11, on Information Society Services and Electronic Commerce (LSSI-CE), users are informed of the following details:

sections.title: 1. Identification data
list: Activity: Provision of digital services through a SaaS platform

sections.title: 2. Purpose
paragraphs: This Legal Notice regulates access, navigation, and use of the website [WEBSITE URL], as well as responsibilities arising from use of its content and services.
Access and use of the website grants user status and implies full acceptance of this Legal Notice.

sections.title: 3. Terms of use
paragraphs: Users agree to use the website according to law, good faith, public order, and this Legal Notice.
Use of the website for unlawful purposes or purposes that may harm its normal operation is prohibited.
The owner reserves the right to modify or suspend the website without prior notice.

sections.title: 4. Intellectual and industrial property
paragraphs: All website content (texts, images, logos, software, design, and source code) is owned by the website owner or used under proper rights.
Reproduction, distribution, or modification of such content without express authorization is prohibited.

sections.title: 5. Liability
paragraphs: The owner is not responsible for damages arising from misuse of the website or possible service interruptions due to technical causes.
The owner is also not responsible for content of external links that may be included on the website.

sections.title: 6. Data protection
paragraphs: Processing of personal data is governed by the Privacy Policy available on this website.

sections.title: 7. Applicable law and jurisdiction
paragraphs: This Legal Notice is governed by Spanish law. For resolution of any dispute, parties submit to the courts that correspond under current regulations.
